allow: PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\lucas\\Documents\\dnl5\\dnl-projetos"; Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList "-NoExit", "-Command", "cd 'c:\\Users\\lucas\\Documents\\dnl5\\dnl-projetos'; npm run dev" -WindowStyle Normal)

PowerShell($resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"admin@dnlprojetos.com","senha":"Admin@2025"}'; $token = $resp.token; $headers = @{Authorization="Bearer $token"}; $clientes = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/clientes" -Headers $headers; Write-Host "Clients: $\($clientes.Count\)"; $clientes | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "$\($_.id\): $\($_.nome\) tipo=$\($_.tipo_pessoa\)" })

PowerShell($resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"admin@dnlprojetos.com","senha":"Admin@2025"}'; $token = $resp.token; $headers = @{Authorization="Bearer $token"; "Content-Type"="application/json"}; $body = @{tipo_contrato='eletrica';tipos_contrato=@\('eletrica'\);cliente_id=3;titulo='Contrato Elétrico';objeto='elaboração do Projeto Elétrico';valor=1500;contratada_qualificacao='DNL PROJETOS TESTE, CNPJ 51.212.533/0001-78'} | ConvertTo-Json; $c = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/contratos" -Method POST -Headers $headers -Body $body; Write-Host "Created: $\($c.numero\)"; Write-Host "cliente_tipo_pessoa=$\($c.cliente_tipo_pessoa\)"; Write-Host "cliente_estado_civil=$\($c.cliente_estado_civil\)"; Write-Host "contratada_qualificacao=$\($c.contratada_qualificacao\)")

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\lucas\\Documents\\dnl5\\dnl-projetos"; Start-Process -FilePath "powershell" -ArgumentList "-Command", "cd 'C:\\Users\\lucas\\Documents\\dnl5\\dnl-projetos'; npm run dev:server" -WindowStyle Normal; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "Server up: $\($r.Content\)" } catch { Write-Host "Server not yet up: $_" })
